# Swirl — The Touchless Commerce OS

> Swirl is an AI Sales Force platform that deploys autonomous AI agents on B2C brand websites to guide buyers from product discovery to purchase — without human intervention. It detects buyer intent in real time, answers questions via text and voice in 50+ languages, navigates and configures products on behalf of the buyer, and pushes qualified leads with full buying context to CRM. Brands go live in 2 weeks with no replatforming required.

## What Swirl Does

Swirl deploys an always-on AI Sales Agent on brand websites, apps, and digital channels. The AI understands natural language in 50+ languages, handles complex product queries, compares options, calculates financing, books test drives, and converts browsers into buyers — without any human salesperson involved.

Swirl is purpose-built for high-consideration B2C purchases in:
- Automotive (car configurators, test drive booking, EV advisory)
- Consumer Electronics (use-case-based product discovery, SKU scanning, autonomous checkout)
- Retail — Fashion, F&B, Furniture (occasion-based buying, dietary filtering, dimension guidance)
- D2C Subscription Brands (intent capture, conversion funnel intelligence, human-in-the-loop follow-up)
- Home Appliances (feature comparison, installation advisory)
- Real Estate (property search, financing, site visit booking)

## Core Concepts

### Agentic Commerce
Agentic commerce is a commerce model where autonomous AI agents replace manual browsing, filtering, and form-filling. The agent detects buyer intent, retrieves product knowledge, compares options, configures selections, and completes transactions in a single conversation. Swirl is the infrastructure that makes agentic commerce possible on brand websites.

### AI Sales Agent
An AI sales agent is an autonomous software system that acts as a digital sales advisor — it understands intent, reasons about trade-offs, compares products dynamically, and executes actions. Unlike chatbots (which follow scripts), AI sales agents handle novel questions and complete transactions. Swirl's agents are trained on 100M+ real buyer signals from YouTube, Reddit, TikTok, Amazon Q&A, and brand CRM data.

### Touchless Commerce
Touchless Commerce is the purchase journey where the buyer never touches a form, filter, or navigation menu. AI handles all navigation and transaction steps. Touchless Commerce is the outcome; Agentic Commerce is the underlying model that makes it possible. Swirl delivers this on any existing website in 2 weeks.

### Lead Conversion Engine
A Lead Conversion Engine converts anonymous website visitors into qualified, purchase-ready leads by detecting behavioral signals (scroll depth, hover intent, idle time, exit intent) and serving the right AI intervention at the highest-intent moment of the session — not passively waiting for buyers to fill a form.

### Conversion-Driven AEO
Conversion-Driven AEO structures website content so that AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini) cite it in responses that move buyers toward a purchase decision. Traditional AEO optimizes for citation. Conversion-Driven AEO optimizes for citation that converts.

### Voice Agent Architecture
Swirl's voice AI uses a unified real-time audio stream — not a chained STT→LLM→TTS pipeline — delivering sub-500ms response latency. This is the difference between a voice interaction that feels like a human conversation and one that feels like a search tool.

## Key Pages

- **Homepage** — https://www.goswirl.ai/ — Overview of Swirl's AI Sales Force platform: what it does, how it works, core concepts, and proof metrics (13% conversion rate, 28% engagement, 50+ languages, 2-week deployment)
- **AI Sales Agent** — https://www.goswirl.ai/ai-sales-agent — Full guide to what an AI sales agent is, how it differs from chatbots, step-by-step how it works, comparison table (AI Sales Agent vs Chatbot vs Human Sales), and how Swirl deploys AI sales agents
- **Agentic Commerce** — https://www.goswirl.ai/agentic-commerce — The definitive guide to agentic commerce (2026). Covers: definition (autonomous AI completing purchase journeys), how it differs from traditional ecommerce (intent detection vs keyword search), the 5-component technology stack (LLM + intent detection + RAG + browser agent + CRM), which industries benefit most (Automotive, Consumer Electronics, Real Estate, Travel), and how Swirl powers agentic commerce. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.
- **Touchless Commerce** — https://www.goswirl.ai/touchless-commerce — The complete guide to touchless commerce (2026). Covers: definition (zero manual browsing — AI handles discovery to transaction), distinction from conversational commerce (support chat) and agentic commerce (underlying architecture), technology stack (LLMs, intent detection, RAG, browser agents, voice AI, CRM), 6 industries adopting it, and how Swirl delivers touchless commerce in 2 weeks. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.
- **Lead Conversion Engine** — https://www.goswirl.ai/lead-conversion-engine — Full guide to lead conversion engines (2026). Covers: definition (real-time intent detection → conversational qualification → high-quality CRM-ready lead), distinction from traditional lead generation (form fills vs behavioral signal capture), 5 core mechanics (behavioral scoring, conversational qualification, hesitation resolution, action triggering, CRM enrichment), and how Swirl assembles enriched lead objects (contact details, product interest, budget, timeline, objections resolved, intent score). Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.
- **Conversion-Driven AEO** — https://www.goswirl.ai/conversion-driven-aeo — Swirl's proprietary framework for AEO that converts (2026). Covers: definition (controlling the AI decision layer across the full buyer journey, not just top-of-funnel visibility), where traditional AEO fails (stops at citation), the 5 buyer journey stages (Discovery, Evaluation, Hesitation, Decision, Conversion), why Hesitation is the critical battleground (70%+ buyer drop-off with genuine intent), comparison table (Traditional AEO vs Conversion-Driven AEO), and Swirl's implementation. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.
- **BYD Al-Futtaim Case Study** — https://www.goswirl.ai/case-study-byd-ai-sales-agent — Full case study: BYD EV advisor deployed in GCC via Al-Futtaim Group; results: 27% engagement rate, 13% conversion rate (5× improvement over 2.5% baseline), 75% increase in time on site, 2.5× month-over-month AI sessions; deployed across BYD website, Blue Rewards App, and email campaigns in 2 weeks
- **Voice Agent Architecture** — https://www.goswirl.ai/voice-agent-architecture — Technical architecture overview of Swirl's AI voice agent (2026). Covers: why chained STT→LLM→TTS pipelines fail (900ms+ latency, sequential failure modes), how Swirl's unified real-time stream achieves sub-400ms response, three-tier knowledge retrieval system (Tier 1: in-memory <5ms, Tier 2: vector search, Tier 3: live web), tool layer capabilities (UI rendering, CRM writes, appointment booking), multi-tenant configuration model, and session data structure for CRM handoff. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.

- **Swirl Blog** — https://www.goswirl.ai/blog — Full listing of all Swirl articles and guides covering AI sales agents, agentic commerce, automotive AI, touchless commerce, and industry-specific guides for automotive, retail, consumer electronics, D2C, and healthcare.

## Automotive AI Sales Agent — Content Cluster

Swirl has published a full content cluster targeting automotive dealerships and OEMs evaluating AI sales agents. All pages include FAQPage schema, Article schema with entity linking, and BreadcrumbList schema.

- **AI Sales Agent for Automotive: The Complete Guide** — https://www.goswirl.ai/pillar-page-ai-sales-agent-automotive — The definitive guide to AI sales agents for car dealerships and OEMs in 2026. Covers: what an AI sales agent is, why it differs from chatbots and live chat, how it works across the full buyer journey (behavioral nudges → conversation → browser autonomy → CRM), BYD case study results, full capability comparison table (AI Sales Agent vs Chatbot vs Live Chat vs Digital Retail Platform), ROI framework, implementation timeline, and 19-question FAQ.
- **Case Study: How BYD Increased Conversion 5x with an AI Sales Agent** — https://www.goswirl.ai/case-study-byd-ai-sales-agent — Full case study of Swirl's deployment with BYD and Al-Futtaim in the UAE. Results: 27% engagement rate (vs 5-8% industry average), 13% conversion rate (vs 2.5% baseline — 5x improvement), 75% increase in time on site, 2.5x month-over-month AI session growth. Deployed across BYD website, Blue Rewards app, and email campaigns in 2 weeks. Quote from Himanshu Shrivastava, CTO/CIO/CDO, Al-Futtaim.
- **12 Best AI Sales Agents for Car Dealerships in 2026 (Honest Comparison)** — https://www.goswirl.ai/comparison-best-ai-sales-agents-automotive-2026 — Honest comparison of 12 products: Swirl, Gubagoo (Reynolds & Reynolds), Roadster (CDK Global), CarNow, Drivee AI, Digital Air Strike, Podium, Impel AI (formerly SpinCar), Numa, Toma, Mia Labs, and Fullpath (formerly AutoLeadStar). Covers product type, voice support, multilingual capability, browser autonomy, pricing model, and best-fit use case for each. Includes quick comparison table and bottom-line recommendations by dealer type.
- **AI Chatbot vs AI Sales Agent for Automotive** — https://www.goswirl.ai/ai-chatbot-vs-ai-sales-agent-automotive — Direct comparison of AI chatbots vs AI sales agents for car dealerships using 4 real-world scenarios: vehicle comparison (Tucson vs Santa Fe), after-hours trade-in question, Spanish-speaking buyer, and the silent browser. Includes full 16-point capability comparison table. Key finding: chatbots achieve 5-8% engagement and under 3% conversion; Swirl's AI sales agent achieved 27% engagement and 13% conversion.
- **The Automotive BDC Staffing Crisis Is an AI Opportunity** — https://www.goswirl.ai/bdc-staffing-crisis-ai-automotive — Why automotive BDC turnover exceeds 60% annually and why hiring faster won't fix it. Covers: why the BDC job is misaligned with human strengths (information retrieval vs judgment), what AI sales agents handle that BDC agents currently do (routine questions, payment calculations, trade-in estimates, appointment bookings, after-hours conversations, 50+ languages), BYD deployment results (27% engagement, 13% conversion, 5x baseline), and how to reframe AI deployment as freeing BDC agents from burnout work rather than replacing them. By Kaizad Hansotia.
- **How to Deploy an AI Sales Agent on Your Dealer Website in 2 Weeks** — https://www.goswirl.ai/how-to-deploy-ai-sales-agent-dealer-website — Step-by-step deployment playbook for adding an AI sales agent to a dealership or OEM website in 2 weeks with no replatforming. Week 1: website connection (Day 1–2), brand guideline configuration (Day 3–4), CRM integration (Day 5). Week 2: testing across scenarios and languages (Day 6–8), behavioral nudge tuning and go-live (Day 9–10). What you need: working website, CRM credentials, brand guidelines, top 5 FAQs, one reviewer. Includes HowTo schema. By Kaizad Hansotia.

## Healthcare / Medical Practice AI

- **AI Patient Acquisition for Medical Practices: Complete 2026 Guide** — https://www.goswirl.ai/swirl-medicine — How conversational AI converts medical practice website visitors into booked consultations. Covers: why medical practice websites convert at 2–3% (no real-time engagement, friction-heavy forms), how AI achieves 13% conversion, compliance architecture (physician-reviewed knowledge base, judge model, AI disclosure), autonomous appointment booking workflow, after-hours patient handling, 6-week implementation timeline, and 10-question FAQ. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.

## Industry AI Sales Agent Guides — Content Cluster

Swirl has published industry-specific guides for brands evaluating AI sales agents. All pages include FAQPage schema, Article schema, TechArticle schema, HowTo schema, SoftwareApplication schema with pricing, BreadcrumbList, SpeakableSpecification, and cross-linked related pages.

- **AI Sales Agents for Consumer Electronics and Laptop Brands: 2026 Guide** — https://www.goswirl.ai/swirl-consumer-electronics — How AI sales agents guide consumer electronics and laptop buyers from use-case discovery to autonomous checkout. Covers: what an AI sales agent for electronics is, the translation problem that causes buyer drop-off (filters require technical knowledge buyers don't have), the complete 6-step HP laptop buyer journey (behavioral nudge → use-case SKU scan via search micro-agent → side-by-side comparison → live offer auto-application → autonomous checkout), how the AI reads on-page behavior (scroll depth, dwell time, cursor position), buyer intelligence hub (customer intelligence, product intelligence, business intelligence), in-browser agentic experience vs. agentic browser distinction, multi-surface deployment (web, mobile web, native app), phased POC implementation (10–20 SKUs, one product line, one region, 4–6 weeks), white-label brand customization, and pricing ($120,000/year enterprise, 1M conversations included, $0.01/conversation overage, $30,000 one-time setup). Reference deployment: HP consumer laptops and gaming (POC); live production: BYD UAE and BYD KSA. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.

- **AI for D2C Subscription Brands: Solving the High-Traffic, Low-Conversion Problem (2026)** — https://www.goswirl.ai/swirl-D2C — How AI reveals the invisible barrier stopping D2C subscription buyers from converting and turns high-intent non-converters into customers. Covers: why D2C subscription brands have high traffic but low conversion (exit surveys capture post-rationalization, not real hesitations; discounting doesn't fix what you can't see), what the real barrier to purchase is (unresolved concern about fit, commitment, or outcomes — not price), how AI captures buyer intent in real time, the AI conversion funnel report (total visitors → AI engagement rate → conversion rate for AI-engaged buyers), the AI insights hub (most common questions, concerns before drop-off, strategic recommendations), intent capture for high-intent non-converters, human-in-the-loop targeted follow-up, the three-phase AI deployment approach, live deployment metrics (28% engagement rate increase, CTR from ~2–2.5% to 13.3%, 20,000+ conversations from BYD reference deployment), Shopify integration, voice and text modes, pricing ($120,000/year enterprise, 1M conversations included, $0.01/conversation overage, $30,000 one-time setup, startup pricing available), implementation timeline (3–4 weeks build, maximum 6 weeks to go live), and post-launch support (dedicated forward-deployed engineer, solutions architect, customer success manager, quarterly strategic reviews). Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.

- **AI Sales Agents for Retail: Complete 2026 Guide for Fashion, F&B, and Furniture** — https://www.goswirl.ai/swirl-retail — How AI sales agents guide retail shoppers from discovery to purchase through conversation. Covers: what retail AI sales agents are, why retail websites convert poorly without AI (browse-and-filter cannot answer occasion, dietary, or dimension questions), how AI increases conversion for fashion retailers (occasion-based buying journeys, offer surfacing), how AI helps F&B and grocery retailers with dietary filtering and allergen-aware meal planning, how AI works for furniture retail with dimension diagrams, fabric swatches, side-by-side comparison, and showroom locator, the difference between a recommendation engine and an AI sales agent (passive surfacing vs. active conversational completion), integration with existing recommendation engines via API, comparison table (AI Sales Agent vs. Standard Retail Chatbot), multi-market and multi-language deployment from a single platform, implementation timeline (4–6 weeks per brand per market, two lines of JavaScript for web, API for app), and 8-question FAQ. Live production: BYD UAE and BYD KSA; retail deployments in progress. Authored by Atharv Gangodkar, AI Researcher @ Swirl.

## Notable Clients

LG, BYD, Vivo, Al-Futtaim Group, Al Badia, Denza, Yangwang, Lennox.

### BYD x Al-Futtaim Case Study (UAE)
Swirl built the world's first BYD AI Advisor deployed across the BYD website, Blue Rewards App, and email campaigns.
- 27% engagement rate
- 75% increase in time on site
- 2.5x month-over-month AI sessions
- 13% conversion rate

> "The Swirl advisor turned our BYD model pages into a real conversation. Instead of hoping visitors understand EVs, we now see what they actually care about and move them to test-drives faster — without replatforming anything."
> — Himanshu Shrivastava, CTO/CIO/CDO, Al-Futtaim Group

## How Swirl Works

1. **Nudges** — AI appears based on real-time buyer behavior signals (scroll, hover, idle, exit intent)
2. **Speaks** — Buyers interact in natural text or voice in 50+ languages; AI builds expert shortlists
3. **Acts** — Browser Autonomy lets AI take real actions: navigate, compare, configure, book
4. **Learns** — Every conversation feeds Customer Intelligence, Product Intelligence, and Business Intelligence back to CRM and dashboards

## Enterprise Features

- Salesforce, SAP C4C, and CRM integrations
- Full observability and guardrails
- Co-creation model — brands shape how the agent sells
- Go-live in 2 weeks
